case_number: constituted for hearing and disposal of C.P. No.2446/2011

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P. NO.D-7012/2015 ________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ________________________________________________________ Hearing/Priority === 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of Misc. 34938/2015 3. For hearing of main case 13.11.2015 Mr. Mehmood A. Ghani, advocate Mr. Saifullah, AAG. ------------------------- Petitioner seeks a writ of quo warranto against respondent No.2 on the ground that he was appointed as Commissioner Workmen Compensation and Authority under Payment of Wages Act, 1923, without consulting with the Chief Justice of this Court. Counsel for the petitioner pointed out that in similar circumstances, larger bench was constituted for hearing and disposal of C.P. No.2446/2011 which is still pending and that this petition may also be tagged with the same. Order accordingly. Let this petition and the connected petition may be fixed after two weeks. In the meantime, comments be filed. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE sharif
